description: Create an interactive GeoGebra visualization of the 2024 US federal income tax brackets for a single filer using the reference data at ~/Documents/GeoGebra/data/tax_brackets_2024.txt. The visualization must include a piecewise cumulative tax function T(x) covering at least the first 6 brackets (up to $609,350) and a step function m(x) for marginal tax rates. Incorporate an interactive income slider (0 to at least 250,000) and a dynamic text annotation for tax or rate values. Adjust the view so the x-axis reaches at least 250,000 and the y-axis reaches at least 60,000. Save the project as 'tax_brackets.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
